global.description: The ad features a clean layout with abstract shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: The ad promotes financial clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: This element features a large oval and a square shape in a light color, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: This element contains a larger square shape with a light color, also centrally positioned, overlapping with other shapes.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape in a light color, located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circle shape in a light color, positioned slightly above the previous circle.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: This element displays bold, dark text stating 'Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind' at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' appears at the top of the ad in a bold, dark font against a light background.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: This element features the text 'Book now' in a bold, dark font, located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, key elements include abstract shapes and clear messaging.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, Your money, clearer, Built for peace of mind, Book now
